post.description: Prepares a delegation transaction for Solana token transfers. You can either provide a `quote_id` (recommended) to automatically use the correct token amount and address from the quote, or manually provide `owner_address`, `token_address`, and `amount`.

owner_address.description: The Solana wallet address that owns the tokens

quote_id.description: The quote ID. When provided, the API will automatically use the sender_amount and token_address from the quote. This is the recommended approach.

token_address.description: The SPL token mint address. Required if quote_id is not provided.

amount.description: The token amount to delegate in USDC/USDT units (e.g., "10.5" for 10.5 USDC). Required if quote_id is not provided. Note: This should be the TOKEN amount, not the local currency amount.
